title: S + must/have to + V（義務必要）

formulas.zh: 主詞必須做某事（主觀強烈義務）
主詞必須做某事（客觀必要條件）

explanation: must 表達說話者主觀上認為強烈必須做的事；have to 則表客觀環境或規則要求必須做。否定形式意思完全不同：must not 表「禁止、不允許」；don't have to 表「不必、無義務」。兩者肯定形式在考試中常互通，但否定形式是區別重點。此句型為高中必掌握基礎語法。

examples.eng: Students must submit their homework before Friday.
examples.chi: 學生必須在星期五前提交作業。

examples.eng: You have to wear a uniform at this school.
examples.chi: 你必須在這所學校穿制服。

examples.eng: I must finish this project today; it's very important.
examples.chi: 我今天必須完成這個專案；這很重要。

examples.eng: They don't have to come to the meeting if they're busy.
examples.chi: 如果他們很忙，就不必來參加會議。

extension.tip: 判斷使用 must 或 have to 的關鍵：若含有個人意見、判斷、強烈想法用 must；若是外在規定、法律、學校制度、他人要求用 have to。否定時最易出錯：must not ≠ don't have to，前者禁止，後者不必。

examples.test: 正確：You must wear shoes in this restaurant.（我堅持認為必須）vs You have to wear shoes in this restaurant.（店規規定）
examples.result: → 兩句肯定形式都可接受，但 must 更強調主觀看法

examples.test: You must not smoke here.（禁止吸菸）vs You don't have to smoke here.（不必吸菸）
examples.result: → 第一句表禁止，第二句表無義務，意思完全不同

examples.test: I must finish this homework today.（我認為很重要）vs I have to finish this homework today.（老師規定或學校要求）
examples.result: → must 強調個人決心，have to 強調外在壓力

extension.note: must 是主觀強調，have to 是客觀規則；否定時 must not 禁止，don't have to 無需。

parts: follow the company safety regulations carefully.
exercises.sentence: All employees must / have to follow the company safety regulations carefully.
exercises.translation: 所有員工必須仔細遵守公司安全規定。

parts: attend the meeting tomorrow; your presence is required by management.
exercises.sentence: You have to attend the meeting tomorrow; your presence is required by management.
exercises.translation: 你明天必須參加會議；管理層要求你出席。

parts: submit their assignments on time, or they will lose marks.
exercises.sentence: Students must / have to submit their assignments on time, or they will lose marks.
exercises.translation: 學生必須按時提交作業，否則會扣分。

parts: speak English fluently for this job, but it would be helpful.
exercises.sentence: You don't have to speak English fluently for this job, but it would be helpful.
exercises.translation: 這份工作你不必說流利的英文，但這樣會有幫助。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 學校規定學生必須穿制服，填空應選擇哪個選項？
mc_exercises.question_eng: All students _______ wear uniforms to school according to the school regulations.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「have to」。因為句中「according to the school regulations」表示這是客觀的學校規則要求，不是說話者主觀判斷，所以用 have to。A 選項 must 強調主觀必須感，但此句強調的是客觀規則。C 選項 should 表示建議或應該，語氣太弱。D 選項 can 表示能力或許可，完全不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 醫生基於專業判斷告訴病人必須戒菸，應填空哪個選項？
mc_exercises.question_eng: The doctor says you _______ quit smoking immediately for your health.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「must」。醫生基於專業判斷認為患者強烈需要戒菸，這是說話者的主觀判斷和強烈建議，所以用 must。A 選項 have to 強調客觀環境或規則要求，但這裡是專業判斷。C、D 選項表示可能性，不符合義務強制的語境。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 區分 must not 和 don't have to 的否定意思，填空應選哪個？
mc_exercises.question_eng: Employees _______ enter the laboratory without protective gear. It is strictly forbidden.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「must not」。句尾「strictly forbidden」表示禁止、不允許，所以用 must not（禁止）。A 選項 don't have to 表示「不必、無義務」，意思是可以選擇不做，不是禁止。C 選項「have not to」文法錯誤。D 選項「mustn't have」是過去推測用法，不符合本句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 考生無義務參加補習班，但若參加就必須遵守規則，填空應選何者？
mc_exercises.question_eng: You _______ attend cram schools, but if you do, you _______ follow their rules strictly.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「don't have to; must」。第一空：「無義務參加補習班」用 don't have to（不必、無強制義務）。第二空：「必須遵守規則」是說話者根據邏輯判斷的強烈要求，用 must。A 選項第一空 must not 表禁止，不符合「無義務」。C 選項順序反覆。D 選項第二空用 have to 強調客觀規則，但此處是主觀判斷。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學生必須在期末考前完成所有作業。
translation_exercises.answer: Students must/have to complete all assignments before the final exam.
key_points: before the final exam時間副詞片語
hints: 提示1：肯定形式，must和have to皆可，表示強制性義務
提示2：動詞必須用原形，不可用completed或completing

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 根據校規，學生不可以在走廊上奔跑。
translation_exercises.answer: According to school regulations, students must not run in the hallway.
hints: 提示1：『不可以/禁止』要用must not，而非don't have to（後者表不必）
提示2：must not後接動詞原形，must和not之間不能分開

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 由於簽證要求，他必須在出發前提交護照副本。
translation_exercises.answer: Due to visa requirements, he must/has to submit a copy of his passport before departure.
key_points: due to + 名詞片語表原因
submit a copy of his passport
hints: 提示1：『因為客觀規定』可用have to強調客觀性，也可用must；兩者在肯定形式通常互通
提示2：copy of his passport為固定搭配，submit後直接接受詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 明年起，所有新員工不必參加為期三週的培訓課程，除非他們之前沒有相關經驗。
translation_exercises.answer: Starting next year, all new employees don't have to attend a three-week training program unless they lack relevant experience beforehand.
key_points: don't have to表無義務/不必
hints: 提示1：『不必』用don't have to（無義務），絕非must not（禁止）；must not會變成『禁止參加』反義
提示2：注意三週training program的表達：three-week為複合形容詞修飾program，中間用連字號
